title: Use stream reset: true on filter change
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/filtered_items_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.FilteredItemsLive). mount/3 streams an empty :items list. handle_params/3 reads %{"tag" => tag} and calls stream(socket, :items, MyApp.Shop.items_by_tag(tag), reset: true). Filter change via <.link patch={~p"/shop?tag=#{tag}"}>. Must use reset: true so the stream fully resets between filter changes.
tier_rationale: reset: true is a specific flag developers often omit.
